name: HWR_VLTR_VOL_MET_VL
query: SELECT A.HCM_PERSON_ID HCM_PERSON_ID, COUNT(A.PROJECT_ID) TOTAL_PROJECT_SUBS, SUM(B.NO_OF_HOURS) TOTAL_HOURS_SPENT FROM HWR_VLTR_VOL_PROJ_REL_VL A, HWR_VLTR_ACTIVITY_VL B WHERE A.HCM_PERSON_ID = B.HCM_PERSON_ID(+) AND A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID(+) GROUP BY A.HCM_PERSON_ID
